eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Mower; Dodge; Fillmore; Freeborn; Olmsted; Steele, MN; at 1:44 PM on AUG 29, 2019 Effective until 1:59 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test from the Mower County Sheriff's office.  This is only a test.
